scope.summary: Provide the default-on, separately stored, redacted unsigned refusal trail without weakening the signed audit tier or the original guard refusal.
out_of_scope: The B12c custom-tool signature-verification producer, which will consume this trail when it lands.
Live Oracle execution or externally shipped audit records.

entry_points.name: default-on and opt-out dispatcher wiring
entry_points.trace: cargo test -p oraclemcp-config audit_config_loads_and_defaults_empty plus scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 120 -- env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp-target/ws-b-b8c-evidence cargo test -p oraclemcp explicit_refusal_trail_opt_out_keeps_the_guard_refusal_without_a_record: 1 passed each in the dedicated clean worktree at 13a7e6fe4848b84efd9c6ab38eb25a52ba798f20. The config defaults the observer on, and the opt-out removes only that observer while preserving the guard refusal.

entry_points.name: redacted refusal corpus append and export surface
entry_points.trace: scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 120 -- env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp-target/ws-b-b8c-evidence cargo test -p oraclemcp refusal_corpus: 7 focused tests passed in the clean worktree at 13a7e6fe4848b84efd9c6ab38eb25a52ba798f20, including a refused statement append, no-secret persistence, tamper refusal, and registered dry-run harness.

entry_points.name: doctor audit postures
entry_points.trace: scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 120 -- env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp-target/ws-b-b8c-evidence cargo test -p oraclemcp-core audit_posture_is_not_inferred_from_the_default_audit_path and cargo test -p oraclemcp doctor_audit_posture_matches_startup_audit_policy_without_opening_a_log: 1 passed each in the clean worktree at 13a7e6fe4848b84efd9c6ab38eb25a52ba798f20. They cover active unsigned keyless-read-only, disabled-by-config, inactive signed tier, and writable no-key startup refusal.

limitations: No live Oracle statement or external SIEM/WORM destination was exercised.
